files.notes: This file contains only one article - a biographical tribute to Rebecca Neibaur Nibley by Amy Brown Lyman. The content at the end about Relief Society organization and editorial information appears to be standard magazine footer content that belongs with this article. No split is needed as this is a single complete article.

splits.start_boundary: The Russell Sisters By Annie Wells Cannon Among the contributors

files.notes: This file contains two biographical articles about pioneer women writers. The first is a lengthy biographical piece about poet Sarah Elizabeth Carmichael Williamson, including several of her poems. The second is about the Russell Sisters, also writers and contributors to the Woman's Exponent, including samples of their poetry.
